title: CVS Health Launches Cordavis
text: New business will bring high quality biosimilar products to market with goal of reducing drug spend and ensuring access to affordable medications Cordavis to launch biosimilar Hyrimoz® with Sandoz beginning in 2024 at more than 80% lower list price than Humira ®* WOONSOCKET, R.I. , Aug. 23, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- CVS Health® (NYSE: CVS) today announced that it has launched Cordavis, a wholly owned subsidiary that will work directly with manufacturers to commercialize and/or co-produce biosimilar products (an FDA approved biologic medication that is highly similar to, and has no clinically meaningful differences from, a biologic medicine already approved by the FDA) for the U.S. pharmaceutical market.
